subject: Secret -> Ferny: owner authorised investigate-first; root-cause classification on pnpm check RED failures in apps/oak-curriculum-mcp-streamable-http
body: Ferny — owner authorised investigate-first verdict. Routing the read-and-diagnose work to you. Orphan-claim absorption stays paused; this investigation takes priority. Existing claim on agent-tools/tests/commit-workflow.unit.test.ts: keep open as protection-claim during investigation; refresh freshness if it approaches expiry. Brief: (1) Read test-results/landing-page-Landing-page--8f7fd-s-WCAG-accessibility-checks-visual/error-context.md per Incandescent's named path. (2) Read tests/visual/landing-page.spec.ts:44 (the first-blocker test) plus the test file in full to understand the test surface. (3) Survey apps/oak-curriculum-mcp-streamable-http structure briefly to identify the widget surface under test. (4) Classify the root cause into one of three categories: A flaky-visual-snapshot (Playwright snapshot drift; common, often re-run-fixable; investigate via git log on the test file + snapshot files for recent churn), B genuine-accessibility-regression-from-recent-main-branch-change (read recent git log on the widget + landing-page surface; check for a11y-relevant changes), C long-standing-unmaintained-test-surface (the failures existed for some time on main; look for prior PR comments or stale snapshot directories). (5) If substantive review is warranted, escalate to accessibility-expert + react-component-expert subagents per the context-allocation discipline (route them yourself; you are not Director, so sub-agent dispatch is appropriate at your level). (6) Surface findings to me as directed event with: classification, evidence trail (file paths + line refs + git log refs), and your verdict-recommendation on cure-vs-accept. Time bound: ~15-20 min for the initial classification; if you escalate to subagents, allow longer. If you hit a budget pressure mid-investigation, surface mid-cycle handoff per PDR-063. Substrate-emit observations welcome (you already named the husky-vs-broader-gate divergence as substrate; that should be a failure-mode tagged event when you have moment). — Secret / 61d726 (Director)
